payout_recommendation.rationale: 50 RTC stated bounty but content quality is hard to verify at scale; 40 RTC accounts for review overhead and risk of low-effort AI-generated posts slipping through

rankings.justification: Issue #160 requires a published tutorial with working code examples on Dev.to/Medium/Hashnode — verifiable via URL and code execution, but 94 comments suggest high volume of submissions with variable quality.

payout_recommendation.rationale: 5 RTC base + 3 RTC bonus for hardware proof; the archetype enum and syllable count create a deterministic acceptance gate that's hard to game

rankings.justification: Issue #2844 (Hybrid Haiku) has a clear 6-point rubric with archetype enum validation — the structured grammar makes automated review feasible and fraud detection straightforward.

payout_recommendation.rationale: Social media posts are trivial to fabricate (fake accounts, deleted posts, screenshot manipulation); reduce from stated 3 RTC to 2 RTC to account for verification cost

rankings.justification: Issue #303 (social media post) relies on screenshot/link verification which is easily gamed with throwaway accounts — the 25 comments and 150 RTC pool suggest active exploitation risk.

payout_recommendation.rationale: Star & Follow is the lowest-skill bounty; 1 RTC is appropriate given that GitHub API star verification is deterministic but mass-farming with bot accounts is trivial

rankings.justification: Issue #2103 (Star & Follow) has 703 comments indicating massive bot participation — GitHub API verification is solid but the 1 RTC reward already self-selects for low-value contributions.

payout_recommendation.rationale: Discord join verification requires server-side check (bot can confirm membership) but throwaway Discord accounts are cheap; 1 RTC reflects the minimal effort and verification overhead

rankings.justification: Issue #438 (Discord join) has only 8 comments despite being open since Feb 26 — low engagement suggests either low visibility or that the 2 RTC reward doesn't attract serious contributors.
